notes: Launch month. Strong PNW concentration (17%). Mobile-heavy traffic (62%). Conversion below target (2.24 vs 2.5 target). Good repeat signal (15%).
Month 2: Improving repeat rate (18.75%). Geographic diversification emerging (WA, ID, CA added). AOV trending up. Cart abandonment increase (48.1% — mobile friction?).
Month 3: Conversion improving (2.54% vs 2.25% average). Repeat rate stable (20%). Bundle popularity increasing (likely prepper segment). Est. LTV trending: $150–$200.
Month 4: Strong growth trajectory. Repeat rate above 20% threshold (22.3%). Bundle sales rising (prepper segment activation). Mobile traffic steady. Refund rate declining (health metric).
Month 5: Seasonal uptick (fall/prep season). CA emerging as second region. Bundle dominance confirmed (22% of revenue). Repeat rate exceeds 24% target. Cart abandonment declining.

Month 6: Highest volume month (prepper/holiday season begins). Regional expansion: CA = OR in orders. Bundle continues dominant. Repeat stabilizes at 25%+ (threshold passed). LTV estimates: Forager $180–$220, Prepper $240–$300.
